phrases.text_local: ¿Desde dónde empieza el Paseo Pereda exactamente?
phrases.pronunciation: des-DEH DOHN-deh em-PEE-eh-sah el pah-SEH-oh peh-REH-dah ek-sahk-TAH-men-teh?

likely_response.local: Junto al monumento a Alfonso XIII, recto.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL moh-noo-MEHN-toh AH ahl-FOHN-soh ksee-EE-ee REHTH-toh
likely_response.translation_en: Right at the end of this square.

responses.english: Right at the end of this square.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL moh-noo-MEHN-toh AH ahl-FOHN-soh ksee-EE-ee REHTH-toh
responses.french: Junto al monumento a Alfonso XIII, recto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Bank of Spain building is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está el edificio del Banco de España?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH el eh-dee-FEE-syoh del BAHN-koh deh eh-SPAH-nyah?

likely_response.local: Cruce la plaza, frente al quiosco azul.
likely_response.pronunciation: KROO-theh LAH PLAH-thah FREHN-teh AHL k-ee-OH-skoh ah-THOOL
likely_response.translation_en: Calderón de la Barca street, very close.

responses.english: Calderón de la Barca street, very close.
responses.phonetic: KROO-theh LAH PLAH-thah FREHN-teh AHL k-ee-OH-skoh ah-THOOL
responses.french: Cruce la plaza, frente al quiosco azul.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main Post Office is
phrases.text_local: Perdone, ¿sabe dónde está la oficina principal de Correos?
phrases.pronunciation: pehr-DOH-neh, SAH-beh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah oh-FEE-see-ah prin-see-PAHL deh koh-REH-ohs?

likely_response.local: Calle Vargas, a dos calles de aquí.
likely_response.pronunciation: KAHL-leh BAHR-gahs AH DOHS KAHL-lehs DEH ah-k-Í
likely_response.translation_en: Vargas street, two streets from here.

responses.english: Vargas street, two streets from here.
responses.phonetic: KAHL-leh BAHR-gahs AH DOHS KAHL-lehs DEH ah-k-Í
responses.french: Calle Vargas, a dos calles de aquí.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist information office is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la oficina de turismo?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, ¿poh-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah oh-fee-SEE-nah deh too-REE-s-moh?

likely_response.translation_en: At the City Hall, ground floor.

responses.english: At the City Hall, ground floor.
